'''âv-sh-k''' ('''kavashak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaginize|vaginize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaginize|vaginize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavashak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivashak|thivashak]] || [[word:jivashak|jivashak]] || [[word:shivashak|shivashak]] || [[word:kivashak|kivashak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvashak|thuthuvashak]] || [[word:jujuvashak|jujuvashak]] || [[word:shushuvashak|shushuvashak]] || [[word:kukuvashak|kukuvashak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvashak|thuvashak]] || [[word:juvashak|juvashak]] || [[word:shuvashak|shuvashak]] || [[word:kuvashak|kuvashak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvashak|thuvashak]] || [[word:juvashak|juvashak]] || [[word:shuvashak|shuvashak]] || [[word:kuvashak|kuvashak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevashak|thevashak]] || [[word:jevashak|jevashak]] || [[word:shevashak|shevashak]] || [[word:kevashak|kevashak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovashak|thothovashak]] || [[word:jojovashak|jojovashak]] || [[word:shoshovashak|shoshovashak]] || [[word:kokovashak|kokovashak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovashak|thovashak]] || [[word:jovashak|jovashak]] || [[word:shovashak|shovashak]] || [[word:kovashak|kovashak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovashak|thovashak]] || [[word:jovashak|jovashak]] || [[word:shovashak|shovashak]] || [[word:kovashak|kovashak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvashak|thĂŠvashak]] || [[word:jĂŠvashak|jĂŠvashak]] || [[word:shĂŠvashak|shĂŠvashak]] || [[word:kĂŠvashak|kĂŠvashak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavashak|thathavashak]] || [[word:jajavashak|jajavashak]] || [[word:shashavashak|shashavashak]] || [[word:kakavashak|kakavashak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavashak|thavashak]] || [[word:javashak|javashak]] || [[word:shavashak|shavashak]] || [[word:kavashak|kavashak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavashak|thavashak]] || [[word:javashak|javashak]] || [[word:shavashak|shavashak]] || [[word:kavashak|kavashak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavashak|shavashak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavashak|goshavashak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavashak|gokishavashak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavashaknĂŒ|shavashaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavashaknknĂŒ|goshavashaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashaknĂŒ|gokishavashaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavashakshĂ«|shavashakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavashaknkshĂ«|goshavashaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavashakshĂ«|gokishavashakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashakro|shavashakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashaknkro|goshavashaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashakro|gokishavashakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashakmu|shavashakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashaknkmu|goshavashaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashakmu|gokishavashakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavashaksher|shavashaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavashaknksher|goshavashaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavashaksher|gokishavashaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavashakng|shavashakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavashaknkng|goshavashaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavashakng|gokishavashakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavashakya|shavashakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavashaknkya|goshavashaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavashakya|gokishavashakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavashakyam|shavashakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavashaknkyam|goshavashaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavashakyam|gokishavashakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashaknĂŒshĂ«|shavashaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshavashaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishavashaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashaknĂŒro|shavashaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashaknknĂŒro|goshavashaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashaknĂŒro|gokishavashaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashaknĂŒmu|shavashaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashaknknĂŒmu|goshavashaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashaknĂŒmu|gokishavashaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashakshĂ«nĂŒ|shavashakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavashaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavashakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashakshĂ«ro|shavashakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashaknkshĂ«ro|goshavashaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashakshĂ«ro|gokishavashakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashakshĂ«mu|shavashakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashaknkshĂ«mu|goshavashaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashakshĂ«mu|gokishavashakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashakronĂŒ|shavashakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashaknkronĂŒ|goshavashaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashakronĂŒ|gokishavashakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashakroshĂ«|shavashakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashaknkroshĂ«|goshavashaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashakroshĂ«|gokishavashakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashakromu|shavashakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashaknkromu|goshavashaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashakromu|gokishavashakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashakmunĂŒ|shavashakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashaknkmunĂŒ|goshavashaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashakmunĂŒ|gokishavashakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashakmushĂ«|shavashakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashaknkmushĂ«|goshavashaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashakmushĂ«|gokishavashakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashakmuro|shavashakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashaknkmuro|goshavashaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashakmuro|gokishavashakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
